title: Polish and finalize Education Timeline section

requirements.text: In frontend/src/components/Education.tsx, review and polish the existing Education Timeline entries. Ensure all four milestones are clearly labelled and well-presented: (1) Nimatpur Girls High School – BSE (10th), (2) CHSE – +2 (12th), (3) +3 Degree (Bachelor's), (4) PGDCA / Multimedia training at Mayuri Multimedia. For each entry, display the institution name prominently, the qualification/level as a subtitle, and include a short descriptive label (e.g. 'Secondary Education', 'Higher Secondary', 'Graduation', 'Diploma in Computer Applications & Multimedia'). Ensure the vertical alternating timeline layout, sky-blue milestone markers, and scroll-triggered animations are intact and visually consistent with the rest of the site.

quotes: plz addit education qulification accoding to the pdf aboate any change

acceptanceCriteria: All four education milestones are visible in the Education section in chronological order.
Each milestone displays the institution name, qualification/level, and a short descriptive label.
The vertical timeline layout with sky-blue markers is preserved.
Scroll-triggered entrance animations are functional for each milestone.
The section is fully responsive on mobile and desktop.

constraints: Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
Do not alter any other sections (Hero, About, Skills, Portfolio, Services, Contact, Footer, Navigation) while editing Education.tsx.
No backend changes are required for this update.
nonGoals: Adding new PDF upload or parsing functionality.
Adding backend persistence for education data.
Creating new education entries beyond the four established milestones.
Modifying any section other than the Education Timeline.
